headline: Stifel Raises Texas Instruments (TXN) Target After Semiconductor Momentum Improves
summary: Texas Instruments Incorporated (NASDAQ:TXN) is included among the 10 Reliable Dividend Stocks to Buy for Long-Term Investors. On June 24, Stifel raised its price recommendation on Texas Instruments Incorporated (NASDAQ:TXN) to $360 from $340. It reiterated a Buy rating on the stock. The firm pointed to improving momentum across the semiconductor sector. In a note […]
